title: Voice & TTS
summary: Configures text-to-speech output (10 providers including Edge TTS free, ElevenLabs, OpenAI, MiniMax, Gemini, xAI, Piper, and custom command providers) and automatic voice message transcription (STT) across all messaging platforms.

env_vars.name: VOICE_TOOLS_OPENAI_KEY
env_vars.purpose: OpenAI TTS and OpenAI Whisper STT

env_vars.name: XAI_API_KEY
env_vars.purpose: xAI TTS and xAI Grok STT

config_keys.description: Piper voice name or absolute .onnx path
STT provider: local, groq, openai, mistral, xai
Whisper model size: tiny, base, small, medium, large-v3

code_examples.caption: Custom command TTS provider
code_examples.code:
tts:
  provider: voxcpm
  providers:
    voxcpm:
      type: command
      command: "voxcpm --text-file {input_path} --out {output_path}"
      output_format: mp3
      voice_compatible: true

code_examples.caption: Piper local TTS
code_examples.code:
tts:
  provider: piper
  piper:
    voice: en_US-lessac-medium

code_examples.caption: Install ffmpeg for Telegram voice bubbles

gotchas: Built-in provider names always win — a tts.providers.openai entry never shadows the native OpenAI provider
Edge TTS, MiniMax, NeuTTS, KittenTTS, and Piper need ffmpeg to produce Telegram voice bubbles
OpenAI and ElevenLabs produce Opus natively — no ffmpeg needed for Telegram
Command providers default to document delivery — set voice_compatible: true for Telegram voice bubbles
ElevenLabs per-model input caps vary (5000-40000 chars) — unknown models fall back to 10000
Provider-specific speed setting overrides global tts.speed
full_text:
# Voice & TTS

Hermes Agent supports both text-to-speech output and voice message transcription across all messaging platforms.

## Text-to-Speech Providers

| Provider | Quality | Cost | API Key |
|----------|---------|------|---------|
| Edge TTS (default) | Good | Free | None |
| ElevenLabs | Excellent | Paid | `ELEVENLABS_API_KEY` |
| OpenAI TTS | Good | Paid | `VOICE_TOOLS_OPENAI_KEY` |
| MiniMax TTS | Excellent | Paid | `MINIMAX_API_KEY` |
| Mistral (Voxtral TTS) | Excellent | Paid | `MISTRAL_API_KEY` |
| Google Gemini TTS | Excellent | Free tier | `GEMINI_API_KEY` |
| xAI TTS | Excellent | Paid | `XAI_API_KEY` |
| NeuTTS | Good | Free (local) | None |
| KittenTTS | Good | Free (local) | None |
| Piper | Good | Free (local) | None |

## Configuration

```yaml
tts:
  provider: "edge"   # edge | elevenlabs | openai | minimax | mistral | gemini | xai | neutts | kittentts | piper
  speed: 1.0         # Global speed multiplier
  edge:
    voice: "en-US-AriaNeural"
  elevenlabs:
    voice_id: "pNInz6obpgDQGcFmaJgB"
    model_id: "eleven_multilingual_v2"
  openai:
    model: "gpt-4o-mini-tts"
    voice: "alloy"
  minimax:
    model: "speech-2.8-hd"
    voice_id: "English_Graceful_Lady"
  gemini:
    model: "gemini-2.5-flash-preview-tts"
    voice: "Kore"
  xai:
    voice_id: "eve"
    language: "en"
  piper:
    voice: en_US-lessac-medium
```

## Input Length Limits

| Provider | Cap (chars) |
|----------|-------------|
| Edge TTS | 5000 |
| OpenAI | 4096 |
| xAI | 15000 |
| MiniMax | 10000 |
| Mistral | 4000 |
| Google Gemini | 5000 |
| ElevenLabs | Model-aware (5000–40000) |
| NeuTTS / KittenTTS | 2000 |

Override per provider with `max_text_length:` under the provider config.

## Telegram Voice Bubbles & ffmpeg

Edge TTS, MiniMax, NeuTTS, KittenTTS, and Piper output need ffmpeg to convert to Opus for Telegram voice bubbles.

```bash
sudo apt install ffmpeg   # Ubuntu/Debian
brew install ffmpeg       # macOS
```

Without ffmpeg, audio is sent as regular audio file (rectangular player).

## Custom Command Providers

Wire any TTS CLI as a command provider:

```yaml
tts:
  provider: voxcpm
  providers:
    voxcpm:
      type: command
      command: "voxcpm --ref ~/voice.wav --text-file {input_path} --out {output_path}"
      output_format: mp3
      timeout: 180
      voice_compatible: true
```

Placeholders: `{input_path}`, `{output_path}`, `{format}`, `{voice}`, `{model}`, `{speed}`.

## Voice Message Transcription (STT)

Voice messages on Telegram, Discord, WhatsApp, Slack, or Signal are auto-transcribed.

Providers: Local Whisper (free, `faster-whisper`), Groq Whisper (free tier), OpenAI Whisper (paid), Mistral Voxtral, xAI Grok STT.

```yaml
stt:
  provider: "local"   # local | groq | openai | mistral | xai
  local:
    model: "base"     # tiny, base, small, medium, large-v3
```

Custom STT: `HERMES_LOCAL_STT_COMMAND` with `{input_path}`, `{output_dir}`, `{language}`, `{model}` placeholders.

## Fallback Behavior

If configured STT provider unavailable: local faster-whisper → local whisper CLI → cloud providers → "voice messages pass through with note to user".
